[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 10000100 2
4 10100100 3
5 10100000 2
6 10100100 3
7 00000000 a
